title: hedyotis schlechtendahliana var. secundiflora
intro: Hedyotis schlechtendahliana var. secundiflora, also known as the Chinese chrysanthemum, is a plant species in the Rubiaceae family, native to China and Southeast Asia, characterized by its fragrant flowers and medicinal properties. The plant is traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, sore throats, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Hedyotis schlechtendahliana var. secundiflora include its ability to relieve coughs, reduce fever, and soothe sore throats, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional Chinese medicine. Hedyotis schlechtendahliana var. secundiflora can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
